item.title: 25 yo pizza delivery man runs into burning house, saves four children who tell him another kid is in the house. He goes back in, finds the girl, jumps out a window with her, and carries her to a cop who captures the moment on his bodycam
item.dc:creator: Muppy

item.description: If this makes it to production, sign me right up! 675hp EV/Hydrogen hybrid. Vintage 70s styling with a modern twist. Edit: Wow, yall went ham on this post! You've made it my second most viral behind the Avril/Hawk post. Thanks!

item.title: Morning Routine
item.description: I've been doing this every day, Mon-Friday for the last couple months. After I call her three "offices", I do the same with other Senate and Congress members. It takes me usually about 30 min to call all the different office lines that I know might not go directly to a machine. Later in the day I'll call the west coast offices. If someone answers, I say my line, don't give them any of my information, and I stay as respectful as the person answering allows me to be. MTG's Georgia offices are used to it by now, and at this point greet me by the name on their caller ID, and tell me to have a nice day when I'm done. Most reps are really respectful, however some are not. I really don't want to keep doing this because honestly, I feel like I'm being a child and not accomplishing anything. But then every morning I read something infuriating that they've said or done, and I'm back at it. FP Edit: I was almost hoping this would die in usersub, but thanks for the support! It still makes me nervous everytime I call, because I'm not trying to have my life and family affected by any sort of retaliation. I will post a few of the sites I use to find numbers, but all I do is google "'so-and-so's' office numbers" and go from there. I don't support cursing at, harassing, or name calling to the people answering the phones, who are more than likely unpaid interns. Some people will ask for a name and zip code, and I tell them "no thanks". I only call and talk with someone once a day, and don't repeat dial. I'll try a few times within the hour, and if no one picks up, I move on and try again the next day. https://greene.house.gov/contact/offices https://boebert.house.gov/contact/offices https://www.cruz.senate.gov/contact/office-locations https://www.hawley.senate.gov/contact-senator-hawley https://cqrcengage.com/dealer/app/person/310?0
item.dc:creator: MysterEF8

item.title: Mental Garbage Dump
item.description:
Need a bit of a mental break from the doom scrolling so this will be the last dump for a while
This will be the theme song playing in my head for the rest of summer
du dun dun dudun - paaa pa pa pa paa
Crab Tax
item.dc:creator: Doomgriever

item.title: ADHD Cookbook.
item.description:
Apparently we're just *really* bad at eggs.
This story was so #relatable that these are only a small percent of the funny 'recipes' shared today. Jokes aside - ADHDer's are twice as likely to die from accidental death. I lost an uncle in a story similar to these. Getting a diagnosis and treatment can add up to 11 years to your life. Stay safe out there and keep your stick on the ice.
item.dc:creator: eepsheep

item.title: My friend worked at a restaurant and she said Sunday Brunch after Church was the worst shift. She got tipped pennies all the time and she was a bad ass.

item.title: Libraries around the world thread
item.description:
Admont Abbey Library, Austria
Bibliothèque Nationale de France, Paris
British Library, London
George Peabody Library, Maryland
Tianjin Binhai Library, China
The Library of Trinity College Dublin, Ireland
Bibliotheca Alexandrina, Egypt
State Library, Melbourne
Stuttgart City Library, Germany
Baroque Library of Metten Abbey, Germany
National Library, Dublin
Biblioteca de Convento de Mafra, Portugal
Real Gabinete Português de Leitura, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
Stiftsbibliothek Sankt Gallen, St Gallen, Switzerland
Bibliothèque Sainte-Geneviève, Paris, France
Rijksmuseum, Amsterdam
El Ateneo Grand Splendid, Buenos Aires, Argentina
Library of Parliament, Ottawa
Royal Library of San Lorenzo de El Escorial, Madrid, Spain
The Morgan Library, United States
Library of Congress, Washington DC, United States
John Rylands Library, Manchester England
The Vennesla Library, Norway
The Iowa State Law Library, Des Moines
Strahovská Knihovna, Prague, Czech Republic
Seattle Central Library, Seattle
Starfield Library in Seoul, South Korea
National Library of China in Beijing, China
State Library of New South Wales
New York Public Library, United States
item.dc:creator: TrytoTry

item.title: Uvalde report: officers had training for this situation and knew what to do, but didn’t do anything.
item.description: Apparently the chief in charge #, Arredondo, and all officers knew what to do in the training. But the chief only checked one room and didn’t check the other rooms and told everyone it was a barricade situation with no kids. TL;DR: Almost everyone in this godforsaken department is an incompetent fucking moron. https://twitter.com/tracy_walder/status/1548787687804502016?s=21&t=8HFQqeFwUvZ_KWZkE9fD5Q
item.dc:creator: tfon12

item.title: America's GOP is one fucked up party of psychopaths

item.title: Who’da thunk it?
item.description: “Australia isn’t experiencing a wage-price spiral, it’s at the beginning of a price-profit spiral”. Copy-paste to your location https://australiainstitute.org.au/post/profits-causing-inflation-in-australia-not-wages-european-central-bank-abs-data-reveal/ Front page edit: first time ever, send good consumer economic vibes to all and sundry. Employers, be good to your staff or it will be the guillotine for you
item.dc:creator: bloodystupidusername

item.title: Walgreens Spams Formula
item.dc:creator: candiedyms

item.title: Fuck me...
item.description: Yeah. She has severe mental health issues along with alcoholism. Texted me Saturday with a pic of a baby saying I might be the father but she already gave it up to an open adoption. I'm in Nevada, she's in California, and a 2nd potential father is in Florida. So I got to spend all day trying to talk to the hospital and government agencies. Hospital says nope, can't tell you shit. Agencies just keep passing me off to diff ones. I've contacted an attorney and will have a zoom meeting later this week. Hoping to get a paternity test ASAP and get this squared away. If it's my daughter I will fight her tooth and nail, and I WILL win. What a fucking disaster tho...sorry, just had to vent. Send some positive vibes, some funnies, downvotes, whatever else you may feel this 41yr old potential single father may enjoy lol EDIT holy wow, thank you all! I'm gonna try to answer as many questions as possible! So I woke up this morning with another text from her claiming she was in a state of psychosis when she texted me and never really got over me, which is why she made the claims...*cue eyeroll*. She fucked around, she's gonna find out. She's staying at a "Christian home for unwed mothers." Which is hilarious as she was VERY anti-religion, but any port in a storm! She's burned so many bridges, she has no where else to go and the couple she sold the baby to went through this church adoption because it's apparently less work and cheaper. And she gets to visit whenever she wants, which is her attempt at finding somewhere to go when either a) this place finds out she's a manipulative liar or b) she shows up drunk again. Florida man knows as well, he wants nothing to do with either but that's most likely because he's her "brother." She was adopted at birth, her adopted mother died around 7yrs ago and a neighbor woman she calls mom tried to help. Fast forward to her last visit to the pysch ward, I spoke to this lady several times and made arrangements to take her back because she had no where left here. She signed a contract for no drinking, which she broke 3 days later and walked in to her "brother"s room and stripped naked...yeah. After that, she was kicked out and somehow made her way to LA, while pregnant and not telling anyone because no one would believe her. She tried to speak to him shortly after birth and he told her to fuck off, so I guess she tried me. And now regrets it. I've been trying to meet someone to start a family with for some time and it's been hard where I live. Whether or not the child is mine, I want to adopt it to get it away from her and the church. I'm no saint either, I have my share of mental health issues, but I have been in therapy and have taken a more active approach to mine for the better part of a decade. I have been looking into adoption already, but it's a lil bit overwhelming right now so I had to take a break. Yes, I stuck my dick in crazy, but it wasn't the first lol. So now I'm facing the problems it created as best as I can. Again, thank you all for your support, and all, I'll make sure this situation is updated when more info comes in!
item.dc:creator: Dysfunkshunill

item.title: I’m making an FPS/TD game where the enemy will cut through doors you seal, but you can vent the invaders into space!
item.description:
Hello! I'm making a tower-defense/FPS hybrid that evokes the desperation of defending a spaceship against insurmountable odds. It features a dynamic campaign which means that aliens will attack in multiple places at once, so you have to choose where to make a stand.
Even if you lose a level it just changes the strategic landscape for the ongoing fight for the ship - think of it as losing the battle but not the war - however you can also reclaim lost levels (important as each of them provide a gameplay modifier). You play as one of the ship's crew that are kept in stasis (called a "SENTRY"), and if you should die another member of the SENTRY Defense Program will be activated to continue the battle - here's a glimpse of death and a new crew respawning into the pods you enter levels by:
There are finite crew, however you can reclaim matter from player corpses to create a new SENTRY :) If you need to buy yourself some time in a level, you can seal blast doors shut, but the enemy will cut through them:
If the aliens are about to achieve a major objective, such as escaping a convoy level or destroying a core, you may wish to consider one of the more destructive actions such as venting a room:
While you may have to sacrifice yourself, sometimes that's a valid choice if the situation calls for it. Oh - and while it's primarily singleplayer, it supports co-op too :)
Hope you like the look of it, would love to hear your thoughts Imgur! Gary
item.dc:creator: gburchell
